title: cordia dillenii
intro: Cordia dillenii, also known as the Wild Olive or Bour tree, is a deciduous tree native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cordia dillenii include reducing blood sugar levels, lowering cholesterol, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and stress. The herbal preparations of Cordia dillenii include teas, infusions, and extracts that can be used to make tonics, capsules, and ointments for various health issues.
